home.subheadline: First home, next investment, or quiet exit — wherever you're heading in Dubai's property market, we'll help you get there.

pillars.buyTitle: A home you'll love coming back to.
pillars.buyBody: Hand-picked apartments, villas, and off-plan opportunities across Dubai's most coveted communities.
pillars.sellBody: Curated buyer networks, calibrated pricing, and the kind of attention boutique advisory uniquely offers.
pillars.rentTitle: The right tenant for the right home.
pillars.rentBody: Landlords and tenants matched with care — long-term residencies, executive lets, and serviced apartments.

search.subtitle: Filter live inventory from across Dubai.

communities.title: The neighbourhoods we know best.
communities.subtitle: From beachfront enclaves to the city's tallest addresses — these are the communities where FEA Properties places the majority of its clients.

founder.name: Feleg Abenker
founder.body1: A decade in Dubai real estate taught me one thing: the difference between a good investment and a great home is the conversation that surrounds it. I founded FEA Properties to make that conversation worth having.
founder.body2: From your first viewing to keys in hand — and every market shift in between — you'll work with someone who treats your decision as personally as you do.

concierge.title: A short conversation. A long-term partner.
concierge.body: Drop us a line and we'll come back to you within the business day with options matched to your brief.

properties.intro: {count, plural, =0 {No active listings} =1 {1 active listing} other {# active listings}} across Dubai.

empty.subtitle: Clear filters or speak with us directly — much of our best inventory moves off-market.

detail.staticMapCaption: Community location — precise coordinates on request

sidebar.requestTitle: Get the full brochure & floor plans.
sidebar.requestBody: We reply within the business day. Your enquiry is added to our CRM and emailed straight to Feleg.
sidebar.name: Your name
sidebar.message: Anything we should know? (Budget, timeline, requirements…)

story.title: Why a boutique, anyway?
story.body1: The first half of my career was inside large brokerages — long lists, templated follow-ups. I learned the market there, and learned just as sharply what I didn't want to build.
story.body2: FEA Properties exists for clients who'd rather have one phone number than ten. Who want a single advisor across rentals, off-plan investments, and resale exits. Boutique doesn't mean small — it means deliberate.
story.body3: We're licensed, registered, and regulated under Dubai's RERA. The numbers we run will match yours; the contracts we draft will hold up. The conversation, more often than not, is the part you'll remember.

contact.intro: Whether it's a quick question, a property tour, or a long-term advisory conversation — we're here. Most enquiries get a personal reply within the business day.

form.title: We'll be in touch shortly.
form.consent: I consent to FEA Properties contacting me about my enquiry.
form.success: Thanks — Feleg will be in touch shortly.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or message us on WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: Boutique real estate advisory in Dubai. Buy, sell, and rent with a team that treats the conversation as carefully as the contract.
